response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack and open-source development experience but but lacks direct embedded networking or security feature development in C for LAN-switch products, a core requirement for this role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with modern languages and frameworks
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement
Diverse technical background including low-latency systems and dev-ops
concerns: No explicit experience with C programming for embedded networking or LAN-switch products
Lacks demonstrated experience with security technologies like MACsec or IEEE 802.1X
